<?php namespace Vonage\Messages\MessageObjects; use Vonage\Entity\Hydrator\ArrayHydrateInterface; class FileObject implements ArrayHydrateInterface { public function __construct( private string $url, private string $caption = '', private ?string $name = null, ) { } public function fromArray(array $data): FileObject { $this->url = $data['url']; if (isset($data['caption'])) { $this->caption = $data['caption']; } if (isset($data['name'])) { $this->name = $data['name']; } return $this; } public function toArray(): array { $returnArray = [ 'url' => $this->url ]; if ($this->getCaption()) { $returnArray['caption'] = $this->getCaption(); } if ($this->getName()) { $returnArray['name'] = $this->getName(); } return $returnArray; } public function getUrl(): string { return $this->url; } public function getCaption(): string { return $this->caption; } public function getName(): ?string { return $this->name; } public function setName(?string $name): void { $this->name = $name; } }
